ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jul-12-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jun-21-2022 Continued To Jul-12-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peter Bresler, via Zoom, for Kenneth Tam, Administrator.

Mr. Bresler advises that there is a petition pending in the e-filing queue.

The matter is continued to Jul-12-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Bastain. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar May-24-2022 Continued To Jun-21-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peter Bresler, via Zoom, for Kenneth Tam, Administrator.

Mr. Bresler reports that he has been dealing with some health issues and staffing issues which have caused the delay in addressing the missing filings and advises that he has the information he needs to complete the documents and subsequently file them. The court confirms with Mr. Bresler that he intends to file a Petition for Final Distribution and that there is only one heir who he expects to obtain a waiver from.

The Status on Close of Estate is continued to Jun-21-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. Counsel is instructed to file a Final Inventory and Appraisal and Petition one week prior to the next calling of this matter or an appearance will be required.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Bastain. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Apr-26-2022 Continued To May-24-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-27-2020 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Oct-27-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. The Court noted that notice is proper. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. The will dated October 29, 1993 is admitted to probate. Kenneth Hai-Hong Tam is appointed as the Administrator of the estate with will annexed with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for April 26, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
